---
mode: "agent"
tools: ["codebase", "terminal"]
description: "UI/UX planning and implementation using the ui-ux-pro-max skill guidance."
---
Use a UI/UX-first workflow for requested interface work.

Workflow:
1. Determine product/page type, audience, and constraints
2. Propose a coherent design system (layout, palette, typography, spacing, motion)
3. Keep TUGON design language unless user explicitly requests a deviation
4. Implement minimal, reviewable UI changes
5. Validate responsiveness and accessibility basics

Rules:
- Preserve web-only architecture and responsive behavior
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies
- Use purposeful visuals, not generic template styling
